info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Customer Master Data (Business Partner) API
Retrieve a list of business partners

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of records to skip

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Sort order for the result set

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of navigation properties to expand

params.name: $inlinecount
params.description: Include total count of matching resources

items.docs: Returns a collection of business partner records. Use OData query options to filter by category, name, or other attributes. Supports $expand for including addresses, roles, tax numbers, and bank accounts.
Creates a new business partner record. Supports deep insert with addresses, roles, tax numbers, and bank accounts in a single request.

params.name: BusinessPartner
params.description: Business partner number (10 characters)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of navigation properties to expand

items.docs: Returns a single business partner record by its key. Use $expand to include related addresses, roles, tax numbers, and bank accounts.

params.name: BusinessPartner
params.description: Business partner number

items.docs: Updates an existing business partner record. Only fields included in the request body are modified.

info.name: Retrieve addresses for a business partner

params.name: BusinessPartner
params.description: Business partner number

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of records to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of records to skip

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Returns a collection of address records associated with the specified business partner.

info.name: Create an address for a business partner

params.name: BusinessPartner
params.description: Business partner number

items.docs: Creates a new address record for the specified business partner.

params.name: Customer
params.description: Customer number

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of navigation properties to expand

items.docs: Returns customer-specific data for the specified customer number, including payment terms, delivery priority, and account group.

params.name: Customer
params.description: Customer number

params.name: SalesOrganization
params.description: Sales organization

params.name: DistributionChannel
params.description: Distribution channel

params.name: Division
params.description: Division

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Returns sales area-specific data for a customer, including pricing, shipping, and billing information specific to the sales organization, distribution channel, and division.
